## Q3 Engineering Review

I am pleased to share the **key highlights** from our Q3 engineering review.

### Major Wins

- **Performance**: We achieved a **23% improvement** in API latency, reducing p99 from 340ms to 261ms.
- **Reliability**: Uptime increased to **99.97%**, exceeding our SLA target.
- **Velocity**: Shipped **18 features** vs. our target of 15.

### What's Next

For Q4, we will focus on the new search infrastructure. Full details available in our [Q4 planning doc](https://docs.example.com/q4-planning).

Looking forward to your feedback!
